game_profile.development_stage: preproduction / vertical slice / production / release (~12 months)
game_profile.core_fantasy: Deckbuilding combined with XCOM-style combat, set in 16th century Granada, protagonist Tycoh seeks alchemical notebook to save family

business.business_model: Premium, single payment, post-launch support, potential sequels
business.target_audience: Age 25-40, indie players, fans of strategy, deckbuilding and narrative

extraction_notes: game_name and studio_name from title and repeated mentions
genre inferred from 'Roguelike + deckbuilder' and gameplay descriptions
development_stage from roadmap slide indicating stages and ~12 months release
core_fantasy summarized from concept slide and gameplay loop
business_model and target_audience from respective slides
current_ask and funding_status from investment and funding slides
team roles and names from team slide
demo presence inferred from 12h played in demo and gameplay footage slide
no explicit wishlist, retention, revenue or community size data
no trailer explicitly mentioned, only request for trailers in funding ask
